testcase.name: @BeforeMethod initializeBrowser

failure.message: Can inject only one of <ITestContext, XmlTest, Method, Object[], ITestResult> into a @BeforeMethod annotated initializeBrowser. For more information on native dependency injection please refer to https://testng.org/#_dependency_injection
